topic: Как контроль питания становится незаметной привычкой
text:
Системная задержка в Кибер-Пространстве! ⚠️🔧 Сегодня считаем сами, пока чинят нейросети.
Считай сам или жди.
image_prompt:
A high-end photorealistic lifestyle shot of a premium healthy meal on a sleek wooden table with integrated neon teal light strips. In the foreground, a person's hand holds an old-fashioned analog wooden abacus or a simple notepad with a pencil, contrasting with a flickering, glitching holographic interface in the background that shows 'ERROR 404' symbols and static. Cyberpunk aesthetic, soft teal and blue ambient lighting, cinematic depth of field, 8k resolution, vertical composition, sophisticated futuristic interior with lush green plants.

Negative prompt: text, letters, numbers, words, typography, logo, watermark, QR code, distorted hands, extra fingers, blurry face, messy environment, low resolution, cartoon, illustration.
